title: Briefing Package for the Minister of Environment and Climate Change and Minister responsible for Parks Canada to appear before the Standing Committee on Environment and Sustainable Development (ENVI) for its study on the Factors Leading to the Recent Fires in Jasper National Park on September 25, 2024 - Open Government Portal
content:
## Briefing Package for the Minister of Environment and Climate Change and Minister responsible for Parks Canada to appear before the Standing Committee on Environment and Sustainable Development (ENVI) for its study on the Factors Leading to the Recent Fires in Jasper National Park on September 25, 2024
Briefing Package for the Minister of Environment and Climate Change and Minister responsible for Parks Canada to appear before the Standing Committee on Environment and Sustainable Development (ENVI) for its study on the Factors Leading to the Recent Fires in Jasper National Park on September 25, 2024.
